---
hub_index: false
title: "Provenance and Maintenance"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

Provenance and maintenance guidance now lives in the canonical ontology conventions file.

- Conventions: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md>
- Term requests: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/SUBMIT_REQUESTS_README.md>
